_comment: Copy this file to serve.config.json and fill in what you have. Prefer OPENROUTER_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variables, or local .env/.env.txt entries. Restart the server after changing anything here.
_mysql_comment: SQL sandbox: point this at your local MySQL/MariaDB so the sandbox runs exam-exact queries. If omitted or unreachable, the browser falls back to in-browser SQLite. Can also be set via MYSQL_HOST/MYSQL_PORT/MYSQL_USER/MYSQL_PASSWORD/MYSQL_DATABASE env vars. 'database' is the sandbox schema the importer (re)creates on each import. These values are also the DEFAULTS for mysql-to-sqlite.js (exam snapshot exporter).
_ssl_comment: For a remote/cloud exam DB over TLS, add an 'ssl' object inside 'mysql' (used by mysql-to-sqlite.js). Examples: {"ssl": true} for system CAs, {"ssl": {"ca": "path/to/ca.pem"}} with a CA file, or {"ssl": {"rejectUnauthorized": false}} for self-signed. On exam day you can instead pass --ssl / --ssl-ca / --ssl-insecure flags to the exporter.
